sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after the RIGHT action
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

before_seg = before.segmentation
after_seg = after.segmentation

# Find white dot positions
before_white = None
after_white = None
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        before_white = n['boundary']
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        after_white = n['boundary']

print(f"White dot: {before_white} -> {after_white}")

# Check blue cross parts - did they move?
print("\nBefore blue cross parts:")
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"  Pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nAfter blue cross parts:")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print(f"  Pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check boxes - did any change?
print("\nBefore boxes:")
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"  Box at {n['boundary']}, children={[before_seg['nodes'][c]['color'] for c in n['children']]}")

print("\nAfter boxes:")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        print(f"  Box at {n['boundary']}, children={[after_seg['nodes'][c]['color'] for c in n['children']]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
